meaning: vt.进入,加入,参加,登录,开始vi.进去,[戏]登场,参加n.输入,[计]回车
examples: The sentry would not let her enter.
The police observed a man enter the bank.
Last year the government began offering grants to disabled people with aspirations to enter politics.
"I would like to enter a dialogue with all people about our common home, " Francis said.
